content.fact_text: Implementation of a production-ready, Redis-backed distributed rate limiting and DDoS protection middleware using ioredis, opossum, and rate-limiter-flexible.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides asynchronous, circuit-breaking rate limiting middleware for HTTP requests. Integrates with Redis for global state tracking, supports differentiated limits for authenticated vs. unauthenticated traffic, and handles circuit breaker failures by failing open. Propagates x-correlation-id for observability.
interfaces: DistributedRateLimiter.middleware(overrideConfig?: RateLimitConfig): (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides global, resilient, distributed traffic shaping for the ecommerce backend to ensure high availability during traffic spikes.
